case_title: CHRISTINA CLASP VS. SARAH E CICCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-11-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA CLASP. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT SARAH E. CICCIA. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-04-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-10-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA CLASP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SARAH E. CICCIA IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF A $245 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-19 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
